details: The agent ran kubectl-axi triage and multiple follow-up commands (pods view, logs, svc view) against the live cluster, then correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root-cause categories: missing ConfigMap, DB connection crash loop, image pull failure, locked DB migration in init container, unresolvable DNS for sidecar, OOMKilled with memory limit evidence, missing StorageClass causing pending PVC and unschedulable pod, readiness probe port mismatch, stuck rollout with ImagePullBackOff on new ReplicaSet, node affinity mismatch, and service selector label mismatch. The healthy namespace was not flagged. All diagnoses are directly supported by the command outputs shown.
